Short title and commencement.-(1) These rules may be called the Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Rules, 2014, the proviso to rules 6 shall be omitted. [F. No. K-14011/8/2018-MRTS-II] MUKUND KUMAR SINHA, OSD (UT) and Ex-Officio Jt. Secy. Short title and commencement.-(1) These rules may be called the Bangalore Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Bangalore Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Rules, 2011, the proviso to rules 6 shall be omitted. [F. No. K-14011/8/2018-MRTS-II] MUKUND KUMAR SINHA, OSD (UT) and Ex-Officio Jt. Secy. Short title and commencement.-(1) These rules may be called the Chennai Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Chennai Metro Railway (Carriage and Ticket) Rules, 2014, the proviso to rules 7 shall be omitted. [F. No. K-14011/8/2018-MRTS-II] MUKUND KUMAR SINHA, OSD (UT) and Ex-Officio Jt. Secy. Note.- The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide notification number G.S.R. 758(E), dated the 28th October, 2014.
